text:
CHAR 

LENGTH: 10 

SOURCE: NCH 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: This field comes from the Claim ACO Identification Number (CLM_ACO_ID_NUM) that is present on 
the first claim record included in the stay. If there is no CLM_ACO_ID_NUM on the 1st claim, then take 
the first found on any of the other claims that make up the stay.
